series_metadata.series_description: All reports produced to the Governor and General Assembly of the total bonded debt for the State of Ohio, including Conduit and Special Obligation debt. This includes Sinking Fund Reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy on agency servers for 10 years from the end of period to which the report pertains. At the time that report is published, send electronic copy of report to State Archives and State Library., Electronic: Delete
